title: rubus idaeiphyllus
intro: Rubus idaeiphyllus, also known as the Himalayan raspberry or Himalayan wineberry, is a type of shrub native to the Himalayan region. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Rubus idaeiphyllus include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting digestive health. Herbal preparations of the plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be made by steeping the leaves or fruit in hot water or a solvent, and can be used to treat a range of ailments.
